name: graphql-expert
description: GraphQL expert for API layer covering queries, mutations, subscriptions, Apollo Client, schema design, caching, optimistic updates

definition.statement: GraphQL is query language for APIs allowing clients to request exactly the data they need. Single endpoint, strongly typed schema, no over/under-fetching
Apollo Client is comprehensive state management library for JavaScript that enables you to manage both local and remote data with GraphQL. Includes caching, optimistic UI, error handling
